metadata.name: Create Installable Images for Image Mode
metadata.description: Build a bootable container image and push it to a container registry for use with image mode for Red Hat Enterprise Linux
objectives: Build a bootable container image and push it to a container registry
prerequisites: Basic understanding of containers and Podman

tasks.name: Verify Containerfile uses rhel-bootc base image
tasks.description: The Containerfile should use the rhel-bootc image as the base image
tasks.success_message: Containerfile correctly uses rhel-bootc base image
tasks.failure_message: Containerfile does not use the correct base image
hints: Check the first line of the Containerfile after any comments

tasks.name: Verify Containerfile adds etc directory
tasks.description: The Containerfile should add the local etc directory to the container
tasks.failure_message: Containerfile does not add the etc directory
hints: This copies configuration files needed for services

tasks.name: Verify Containerfile installs and enables httpd
tasks.description: The Containerfile should install the httpd package and enable the service
tasks.success_message: Containerfile correctly installs and enables httpd
tasks.failure_message: Containerfile does not properly install or enable httpd
hints: Use: RUN dnf install -y httpd && systemctl enable httpd
Both installation and enabling should be in a single RUN command

tasks.name: Verify Containerfile copies index.html
tasks.description: The Containerfile should copy index.html to /var/www/html/
tasks.failure_message: Containerfile does not copy index.html to the web server directory
hints: The index.html file should exist in the same directory as the Containerfile

tasks.name: Verify container image was built locally
tasks.description: The webserver-bootc container image should exist locally
hints: Run the command from the ~/RH304/labs/image-bootable directory

tasks.name: Verify web server responds on port 8080
tasks.description: A test container should be running and serving content on port 8080

checks.command: curl -s localhost:8080 | grep -q 'Hello image mode for RHEL!'

tasks.success_message: Web server responding correctly on port 8080
tasks.failure_message: Web server not responding or incorrect content

tasks.name: Verify image pushed to registry
tasks.description: The container image should be available in the registry
tasks.success_message: Container image successfully pushed to registry
tasks.failure_message: Container image not found in registry
